CVE-2018-14521.title: An issue was discovered in aubio 0.4.6. A SEGV signal can occur i ...
CVE-2018-14521.summary: An issue was discovered in aubio 0.4.6. A SEGV signal can occur in aubio_source_avcodec_readframe in io/source_avcodec.c, as demonstrated by aubiomfcc.

CVE-2018-14522.title: An issue was discovered in aubio 0.4.6. A SEGV signal can occur i ...
CVE-2018-14522.summary: An issue was discovered in aubio 0.4.6. A SEGV signal can occur in aubio_pitch_set_unit in pitch/pitch.c, as demonstrated by aubionotes.

CVE-2018-14523.title: An issue was discovered in aubio 0.4.6. A buffer over-read can oc ...
CVE-2018-14523.summary: An issue was discovered in aubio 0.4.6. A buffer over-read can occur in new_aubio_pitchyinfft in pitch/pitchyinfft.c, as demonstrated by aubionotes.
